topic: Circuit with variable resistor in series
image_prompt: SVG circuit: cell on top, bulb (⊗) with voltmeter (V) across it on the lower-left branch, a variable resistor (rectangle with diagonal arrow) in series, and an ammeter (A) on the right side.

render_data.title: Variable resistor in series with the bulb
render_data.task: The bulb is 24 Ω (12 V ÷ 0.5 A). A variable resistor is added in series. As R_var increases, total resistance rises, so the current I = 12 / (24 + R_var) falls and the voltage across the bulb (V = 24·I) drops, making the bulb dimmer.

topic: Kilimanjaro boiling point vs altitude scene
image_prompt: SVG scene: snow-capped Mount Kilimanjaro under a blue sky with a thermometer (and magnifying glass) on grass at left; dashed leader lines link 11 altitudes (5900, 5200, 4700, 4200, 3700, 3200, 2700, 2200, 1700, 1200, 700 m) to boiling points (80.0, [blank at 5200], 84.5, 90.0, 88.0, 89.5, 91.5, 92.0, 94.0, 96.0, 97.5 °C). Titled 'Kilimanjaro results'.
